series_metadata.series_description: This form is filed with a sales or seller's use tax return (ST-10) or (UT-1018) where the vendor or seller has been granted cumulative authority. Information contained on this sheet is a recap of sales activity of a specific vendor or seller with multiple locations and indeicates the business conducted at each location.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: After microfilming - destroy by shredding. Prior to filming, data on filed forms shall be captured by data processing and preserved for purpose of conducting an audit of the cumulative sales tax return (ST-10). Film will be duplicated and stored separately. Forms not microfilmed will be destroyed four years after received date. ; Microform: Film will be duplicated and stored separately., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Wastepaper
